data.content: Fixed history gap for .knots/_worktree active repo paths by canonicalizing to the parent repo when discovering related log roots. Added regression coverage to ensure beat summaries and session detail load from canonical repo-local logs when queried from .knots/_worktree. Quality gates: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed commit 1ec2cd33c730874754b2d2e1365b8b9127c1b29e to origin/main.
